code: export const CMS_ROLES=['Admin','HOD','Coordinator','Faculty','Principal','Student GS','Student Sports','Organizer'];export const normalizeRole=role=>String(role||'').trim().toLowerCase();export const isOrganizerRole=role=>normalizeRole(role)==='organizer';export const hasFullCmsAccess=role=>!isOrganizerRole(role);export const getAdminHomeByRole=role=>isOrganizerRole(role)?'/admin/scanner':'/admin';
